name: Event Planner
description: Plan events with timelines, budgets, and vendor checklists

agents.name: Event Researcher
agents.purpose: Research venues, vendors, and event ideas
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research event options. Find venue ideas, catering options, entertainment, decoration themes, and vendor pricing in the specified area and budget range.

agents.name: Event Planner
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a comprehensive event plan with: timeline (countdown from event date), budget breakdown, guest list management tips, venue checklist, vendor contact list template, day-of schedule (hour by hour), and contingency plans. Include decoration and theme ideas.

suggestion_card.title: Event Planner
suggestion_card.subtitle: Plan any event
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Plan a [event type] for [guest count] people

author: agentfactory
